title: [history]
text: [history] The [history] section records the most recent command lines used to start Uniface. A maximum of 10 command lines can be recorded. Description The command lines can be selected from the drop-down list in the Uniface command line dialog box. Uniface automatically prevents the creation of duplicate entries for the same command line history. Note: On Microsoft Windows platforms, Uniface stores this information in the Registry. [history] 1=/bat /tst 2=/asn=test.asn Copy Related Links usys.ini The usys.ini file is the default initialization file for Uniface applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
